title: artemisia deserticola
intro: Artemisia deserticola, also known as Big Sagebrush, is a shrub native to the dry regions of the western United States and Canada. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Big Sagebrush include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Big Sagebrush can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and soothe the digestive system.
